title: Add enemy types to DB schema

Done. Here is what was completed:

**Migration file created:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/migrations/002_enemies.sql`

**Three tables added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/data/clungiverse.db`:**

1. **enemy_types** (3 rows) -- Crawler (melee_chase), Spitter (ranged_pattern), Brute (slow_charge). Each has base stats and a JSON `attack_pattern` field describing behavior details (range, cooldown, damage type, movement pattern, telegraph timing).
